overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a wizarding school divination classroom featuring gothic stone architecture, purple velvet drapes, and students in robes seated around tables with crystal balls. The static camera captures the atmospheric circular room as characters enter and move through the space.

woman in patterned dress walks from left to right across the foreground

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style divination classroom with stone walls, purple drapes, and tall arched windows. Several students in dark robes sit around circular tables with crystal balls. At 20 seconds, a student enters from the right and sits down, followed by a woman walking across the foreground from left to right at 26 seconds. The room features a large wizard tapestry on the left wall and ornate wooden furniture throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric view of a gothic divination classroom that remains still as students and faculty move through the space. It begins with a wide look at the stone walls, purple velvet drapes, and tall arched windows where students in dark robes are already seated around circular tables with crystal balls. As the scene unfolds, a student enters from the right to take a seat, adding a sense of lived-in activity to the ornate wooden furniture and the large wizard tapestry on the left wall. The composition then shifts in focus as a woman walks across the foreground from left to right, completing the sequence of movement within the silent, mystical environment.
